openai.description: OpenAI GPT-5.4 OCR via Responses API

anthropic.description: Anthropic Claude OCR via Messages API

limits.notes: project/links/claude-all-links.md documents standard unencrypted PDF support, image support for JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP up to 5 MB each, Messages/Token Counting requests up to 32 MB, Files API uploads up to 500 MB, and uploaded files persist until deleted. AutoShow Anthropic OCR chunks PDFs into 10-page Files API uploads and rejects encrypted/password-protected PDFs.
